prompt:
You are implementing an OpenSpec change: deep-scan-10x

## Context

Read these artifacts to understand the change:
- openspec/changes/deep-scan-10x/proposal.md (why, scope, goals)
- openspec/changes/deep-scan-10x/design.md (architecture decisions)
- openspec/changes/deep-scan-10x/tasks.md (checklist of work)

## Your Goal

Implement all remaining tasks in tasks.md. Work through them in order.
Mark each task complete ('- [ ]' -> '- [x]') as you finish it.

When ALL tasks are complete and tests pass, output exactly:
<promise>COMPLETE</promise>

## Guidelines

- Run `export JAVA_HOME=$(brew --prefix openjdk@17)` and `./gradlew compileDebugKotlin` periodically to catch issues early.
- Use `gemini-deep` subagents via the Task tool to do the heavy lifting for scanning and fixing.
- If you hit a blocker on one task, note it and continue to the next.
- Mark tasks complete as you go, not all at the end.
- If something breaks and you can't fix it, exit. I'll call you again with fresh context.

## Completion

Only output <promise>COMPLETE</promise> when:
1. All tasks in tasks.md are checked off
2. The project compiles successfully
3. The codebase passes all strict heuristics

If you finish a session without completing everything, just exit normally.
I will invoke you again and you'll see your previous work in the filesystem.
